subcodes.first_line: Hearken, O servant, unto that which is revealed unto thee from the holy precincts, and turn not unto them that have disbelieved and joined partners with God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع یا عبد ما یوحی الیک عن شطر القدس و لاتلتفت الی الذینهم کفروا و اشرکوا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
